statement: In every magma, Equation 2539 (`x = (y * ((y * x) * z)) * w`) implies Equation 3599 (`x * y = z * ((y * x) * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0091
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op (op y x) z)) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op z (op (op y x) x))
